text.title: langchain-agents-architectures Output Contract
text.summary: Tool docstring contract, agent invocation result schema, and supervisor Route schema.

section.title: Tool docstring contract
section.p: Tool docstring is the agent-facing prompt. It MUST contain three labelled sections in order: "Use for:", "Do NOT use for:", "Returns:".
section.code:
@tool def web_search(query: str) -> str: """Search the web.
Use for: facts, recent events, company info, pricing. Do NOT use for: math, code execution, structured data. Returns: plain-text top-5 results, truncated to ~2k chars. """ ...

section.title: Supervisor Route schema
section.code:
from typing import Literal from pydantic import BaseModel
class Route(BaseModel): agent: Literal["researcher", "coder", "writer"] reason: str

example.note: Tracks iteration count + session_id for trace attribution.
No session_id; LangSmith traces cannot be cross-referenced. Validator rejects.

list.item: Every tool docstring has Use/Do NOT use/Returns sections.
Supervisor uses `Route` Pydantic model, not free text.
